user_message: Can you help me build the narrative? The customer (Litware Inc) is asking about deployment blockers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 16:08 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
Date: 2024-02-09 11:12 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Litware Inc

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-24 17:35 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Litware Inc
Date: 2024-03-14
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc), David Chen (Microsoft), Michelle (Litware Inc)

[00:02:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:07:00] Michelle (Litware Inc): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:12:00] Michelle (Litware Inc): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Michelle (Litware Inc): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Michelle (Litware Inc): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:24:00] Michelle (Litware Inc): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:28:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:32:00] Michelle (Litware Inc): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.
